rationale.hitl-workflow: Developers explicitly activate assistance, preview context, and approve selections before submission.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Dependency graphs and summaries make AI context visible and actionable.
rationale.agent-scope-drift: Explicit file boundaries prevent AI from accessing arbitrary or irrelevant context.
rationale.framework: Modular, extensible architecture integrates controlled context assembly into development workflows.
rationale.built-system: Authors implemented and open-sourced the working Python-based Lumen tool.
